scripts.desktop:dev: pnpm --filter @reader/shared build && pnpm --filter @reader/desktop build && concurrently -k -n api,web,electron -c blue,green,magenta "pnpm --filter @reader/api dev" "pnpm --filter @reader/web dev" "wait-on tcp:3000 http://127.0.0.1:4317/api/books && cross-env ELECTRON_DEV=1 electron apps/desktop"
scripts.desktop:build: pnpm --filter @reader/shared build && pnpm --filter @reader/api build && pnpm --filter @reader/web build && pnpm --filter @reader/desktop build
